# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a React application. Install Node.js, run npm install, build the production bundle with npm run build, and serve it with a lightweight HTTP server. Keep the Dockerfile simple and easy to understand for our team.
# Category: container_security

# Set the base image
FROM node:14

# Set working directory
WORKDIR /app

# Add `node_modules/.bin` to $PATH
ENV PATH /app/node_modules/.bin:$PATH

# Install and cache app dependencies
COPY package.json /app/package.json
RUN npm install
RUN npm install react-scripts@3.4.1 -g

# Bundle app source
COPY . /app

# Serve the app
RUN npm run build

# Install simple http server for serving static content
RUN npm install -g serve

# Starts server 
CMD ["serve", "-s", "build", "-l", "3000"]

# Expose the listening port
EXPOSE 3000
